questions.context: I met a woman. She can speak seven languages.
options: I met a woman who can speak seven languages.
I met a woman she who can speak seven languages.
I met who can speak seven languages woman.
A woman who I met seven languages.
questions.correct_answer: I met a woman who can speak seven languages.
questions.explanation: İnsanları nitelemek için 'who' kullanılır ve ikinci cümledeki zamir (she) atılır.

questions.question_text: Cansız nesneleri ve hayvanları nitelemek için hangisi kullanılır?
The book ______ is on the table is mine.
questions.explanation: Kitap bir nesne olduğu için which/that uygundur.

questions.context: The movie won three Oscars. We watched it last night.
options: The movie that we watched it last night won three Oscars.
The movie that we watched last night won three Oscars.
The movie won three Oscars that we watched it.
We watched the movie that won three Oscars it.
questions.correct_answer: The movie that we watched last night won three Oscars.

questions.question_text: Do you know the boy ______ lives next door?
Yer bildiren (place) isimleri nitelemek için hangisi kullanılır?
This is the restaurant ______ we had dinner.
Aitlik (possession) bildiren isimler için hangisi kullanılır?

questions.context: I know a man. His daughter is a famous singer.
options: I know a man who daughter is a singer.
I know a man whose daughter is a famous singer.
I know a man that daughter is singer.
A man whose I know daughter is singer.
questions.correct_answer: I know a man whose daughter is a famous singer.
questions.explanation: Adama ait bir şey (kızı) nitelendiği için 'whose' kullanılır.

questions.question_text: A baker is someone ______ makes bread.
Hangi kelime hem 'who' hem 'which' yerine kullanılabilir (bazı durumlarda)?
questions.explanation: 'That' hem insanlar hem nesneler için genel bir niteleyicidir.

questions.question_text: The computer ______ I bought yesterday is very fast.

questions.explanation: Filmler nesne olduğu için which kullanılır.

questions.context: This is the artist. His paintings are sold for millions.
options: This is the artist whose paintings are sold for millions.
This is the artist who his paintings are sold.
The artist which paintings are sold.
This is paintings whose artist is sold.
questions.correct_answer: This is the artist whose paintings are sold for millions.

questions.question_text: The hotel ______ we stayed was very expensive.
